calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-08-2019 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Adam Garland, plaintiff/respondent appearing on his own behalf without his attorney of record; defendant/appellant Horneff Waddle Corporation is present, represented by property manager Michelle Horneff-Cohen

This cause comes on regularly on appeal of the denial of motion to vacate judgment. All parties are affirmed.

Ms. Horneff-Cohen testifies on behalf of appellant Horneff Waddle Corporation. Ms. Horneff-Cohen presents an envelope that was returned as undeliverable, and copy of letter received from plaintiff. These items are returned at the end of testimony.

Respondent testifies on his own behalf, and presents a video to the Court. The video is returned at the end of testimony.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar May-08-2019 Set For Trial On May-08-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 306

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-08-2019 Continued To May-08-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Mar-11-2019 Denied

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
